name: Sharon's Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
-DIRECTIONS
-First, cook and drain the lasagne noodles. Brown the meat mixture thoroughly. Add seasonings such as oregano, basil, garlic salt, and pepper. Incorporate tomatoes and tomato paste, then simmer for 30 minutes.
-Mix the cheese mixture in a separate bowl. Layer the noodles, half of the meat mixture, all of the cheese mixture, another layer of noodles, and the remaining meat mixture on top. Spread with the rest of the mozzarella cheese and sprinkle additional Parmesan.
-Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes. Allow to stand for 15 minutes before serving.
